task: Open Notepad, type the text 'ELOS S5 test OK', then close Notepad without saving.

text: I'll start by taking a screenshot to see the current state of the screen.
I can see the desktop with a taskbar at the bottom. I'll open Notepad by searching for it using the Windows search bar.
The Windows search menu is open. I'll type "Notepad" to search for it.
Notepad appears as the top result. I'll click on "Öffnen" (Open) to launch Notepad.

Notepad is now open with some existing text. I can see it has "Pre-Audit SendKeys Test" already in it. I need to click in the text area to position my cursor, then type the required text. I'll click at the end of the existing content or on a new line. Let me click on a new area to add new text. First, let me click at the beginning of the text area to place my cursor, then select all and type the new text.

Actually, I should add a new line after the existing text, or I can just type at a new location. Let me click at the end of the document and add the text on a new line.

Wait - the task says to open Notepad and type the text. The Notepad already has some content. I'll click at the end of the existing text and add the new text on a new line.
I can see that "ELOS S5 test OK" has been successfully typed on the second line of the Notepad. Now I need to close Notepad without saving. I'll click the X button to close it.

A dialog box appeared asking whether to save the changes. I can see three options: "Speichern" (Save), "Nicht speichern" (Don't Save), and "Abbrechen" (Cancel). Since I need to close Notepad **without saving**, I'll click "Nicht speichern" (Don't Save).

It looks like clicking "Nicht speichern" opened a new empty Notepad tab instead of closing the application. The tab with the previous content was closed without saving, and now it shows a new blank "Unbenannt" (Untitled) tab. I need to close this Notepad window entirely. Let me click the X button to close it.

Notepad has been successfully closed. The task has been completed:

1. ✅ **Opened Notepad** - Searched for and launched Notepad from the Windows search bar.
2. ✅ **Typed the text 'ELOS S5 test OK'** - The text was successfully typed into Notepad.
3. ✅ **Closed Notepad without saving** - When prompted to save, I clicked "Nicht speichern" (Don't Save), and then closed the remaining empty Notepad window.

The Notepad application is now fully closed and the text was not saved.
